subject: Daylight_v0.6

score_state.reason: This plan records evidence required to clear caps; it does not clear any cap by itself.

active_cap_blockers.name: no_independent_external_reviews_tracked
clearance_requires: two independent signed external review records
review scope covers formal model, provider-backed vectors, production-authority blockers, and claim discipline
all production-blocking findings are addressed or explicitly deferred with score impact

active_cap_blockers.name: no_integrated_public_authority
clearance_requires: certificate predicate proof integrated into Daylight authority evidence
revocation predicate proof integrated into Daylight authority evidence
transparency-log predicate proof integrated into Daylight authority evidence
install, witness, publish, and trust predicate proofs digest-bound to local evidence
Daylight authority verifier reports integrated_public_authority=true

active_cap_blockers.name: no_production_authority_publish_authority_or_trust_gate
clearance_requires: non-fixture production authority root
signed Golden Lock 4-of-5 production authority ceremony
positive production publish-authorized-rooted authority path
positive production trust-authorized-rooted authority path
fixture authority roots continue to reject allow-trust and allow-publish
production authority verifier accepts publish/trust only after positive production Gate authority exists

active_cap_blockers.name: no_runtime_containment_enforcement
clearance_requires: named OS-enforced containment profile
seccomp or equivalent syscall policy evidence for the profile
namespace or equivalent isolation evidence for the profile
fail-closed tests when kernel support is missing
claim text remains limited to the verified profile

active_cap_blockers.name: no_whole_system_post_quantum_safety_claim
clearance_requires: real pinned PQ verifier evidence
hybrid or PQ authority policy for selected release lanes
classical-only evidence remains labeled quantum-vulnerable
whole-system PQ safety is not claimed from verifier evidence alone

publish_trust_command_contracts.name: publish-authorized-rooted
must_reject_now: contracts whose action is not publish
publish authority decisions with allow-publish false
activation_requires: positive authority decision path for production publish roots
authority root parser that can accept allow-publish true only for production roots
negative tests for fixture roots, wrong action, malformed contracts, and policy mismatch
claim text remains decision-only until production verifier evidence is linked

publish_trust_command_contracts.name: trust-authorized-rooted
must_reject_now: contracts whose action is not trust
trust authority decisions with allow-trust false
activation_requires: authority root parser that can accept allow-trust true only for production roots
negative tests for fixture roots, wrong action, malformed contracts, and policy mismatch
claim text remains decision-only until production verifier evidence is linked

non_claims: this plan does not raise the Daylight score
this plan does not create production authority
this plan does not complete publish or trust production authority
this plan does not raise score from decision-only publish/trust support
this plan does not claim runtime containment
this plan does not claim whole-system post-quantum safety
this plan does not count as independent external review
